scripts.test:e2e: JWT_SECRET=test_secret COUNTRY_CODE=FR MISTRAL_API_KEY=dummy PORT=3000 DB_TYPE=sqlite DB_NAME=:memory: jest --config ./test/jest-e2e.json
scripts.test:unit:nucleus: jest tenant-context.spec.ts audit.service.spec.ts audit.controller.spec.ts agents.controller.spec.ts agents.service.spec.ts agent-alerts.controller.spec.ts agent-alerts.service.spec.ts hospital-services.controller.spec.ts hospital-services.service.spec.ts compliance-alert.service.spec.ts compliance-worker.service.spec.ts compliance-validation.service.spec.ts work-policies.service.spec.ts planning.controller.spec.ts planning.service.spec.ts leaves.service.spec.ts --runInBand
scripts.test:e2e:isolation: npm run test:e2e -- agents-isolation.e2e-spec.ts agent-alerts-isolation.e2e-spec.ts hospital-services-isolation.e2e-spec.ts audit-isolation.e2e-spec.ts planning-leaves-isolation.e2e-spec.ts planning-shift-mutations.e2e-spec.ts planning-compliance.e2e-spec.ts planning-security-isolation.e2e-spec.ts rbac-work-policies-isolation.e2e-spec.ts sprint12-phase5-workflow.e2e-spec.ts --runInBand
scripts.lint:core: eslint src/auth/tenant-context.ts src/agents/agent-alerts.controller.ts src/agents/agent-alerts.service.ts src/planning/dto/work-policy.dto.ts src/planning/dto/compliance-api.dto.ts src/planning/work-policies.service.ts src/planning/compliance-alert.service.ts src/planning/compliance-worker.service.ts
scripts.lint:e2e: eslint test/agents-isolation.e2e-spec.ts test/agent-alerts-isolation.e2e-spec.ts test/hospital-services-isolation.e2e-spec.ts test/audit-isolation.e2e-spec.ts test/planning-leaves-isolation.e2e-spec.ts test/planning-shift-mutations.e2e-spec.ts test/planning-compliance.e2e-spec.ts test/planning-security-isolation.e2e-spec.ts test/rbac-work-policies-isolation.e2e-spec.ts test/sprint12-phase5-workflow.e2e-spec.ts
scripts.ci:quality: npm run build && npm run lint:core && npm run lint:e2e && npm run test:unit:nucleus && npm run test:e2e:isolation
scripts.ci:frontend: npm run frontend:build && npm run frontend:budget:check && npm run frontend:lint && npm run frontend:test && npm run frontend:audit && npm run frontend:smoke:routes
scripts.ci:product: npm run ci:frontend && npm run ci:quality
